revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24699703697|time triggered pipeline]]

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Futarasan Shrine Chūgū-shi
| native_name = 二荒山神社中宮祠
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Futarasan Shrine Chūgū-shi
| coordinates = {{coord|36.741432|139.486896}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Futarasan Shrine Chūgū-shi'''|二荒山神社中宮祠}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shimotsuke Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Myojin Taisha|lt=Myōjin Taisha|en|Myojin Taisha|fr|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社|simple|Myōjin Taisha|zh|名神大社|qid=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shinto shrines by tradition|lt=Shinto shrines by tradition|qid=Q135107927|1=Shinto shrines by tradition}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11361380|ltq=Q11361380|qid=Q11361380|1=List of Shikinaisha in Shimotsuke Province}}
** Series ordinal: 4
** P155: {{ill|Murahino Shrine|lt=Murahino Shrine|qid=Q135039971|1=Murahino Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q11433065|ltq=Q11433065|qid=Q11433065|1=Ōsaki Shrine}}

{{nihongo|'''Futarasan Shrine Chūgū-shi'''|二荒山神社中宮祠}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shimotsuke Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
